spell.duration: until the start of your next turn
spell.name: Guidance
spell.text: You ask for the guidance of supernatural entities, granting the target a +1 status bonus to one attack roll, Perception check, saving throw, or skill check the target attempts before the duration ends. The target chooses which roll to use the bonus on before rolling. If the target uses the bonus, the spell ends. Either way, the target is then temporarily immune for 1 hour.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.text: A spell you can cast at will that is automatically heightened to half your level rounded up.

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.
